subject: Re: Relion 4.0 starfile to M
body:
By not not changing the column headers… you can however remove the optics
table… and in M in the “shifts correspond to” field enter 1Å/px.

On Tue, 23 Aug 2022 at 07:40, 클레이 <mgmg980910@gmail.com> wrote:

> Hi
>
> I was trying to process apoferritin which was auto-refined in Relion 4.0.
> So I converted the columns rlnOriginXAngstroms to rlnOriginX and Y, Z too.
> Then, I  specified 1.0A/px for the shifts. But M told me Star files didn't
> contain all essential columns. How can I solve this problem?
>
> Thank you
>
> Min-gyu
>
>
> --

Pranav
